stories.title: Dockable / collapsible panel layout
stories.description: Implement a dockable, resizable, collapsible panel system using AvalonDock so all views (log, agents, soundboard, now-playing) can be arranged by the user and persisted across sessions.
references: Â§4 Panel Layout System
Â§5.1 Core Shell — SHELL-01
Â§8 Persistence (Panel layout → layout.xml)

stories.title: System tray integration
stories.description: App minimizes to the system tray. Right-click context menu exposes: show/hide window, mute all, exit.
references: Â§5.1 Core Shell — SHELL-02

stories.title: Dockable mini-mode strip
stories.description: A compact floating strip showing per-agent status lights and master volume. Can be docked to a screen edge via Win32 AppBar or float freely.
references: Â§5.1 Core Shell — SHELL-03

stories.title: Configurable global hotkey bindings
stories.description: In-app UI for binding keyboard shortcuts to actions: mute all, toggle/solo a machine, force-play an agent, toggle an agent, switch profile, show/hide window. Uses RegisterHotKey via P/Invoke. Per-machine hotkey bindings override global app-level bindings when that machine is active.
references: Â§5.1 Core Shell — SHELL-04
Â§7 Hotkey Architecture

stories.title: Missing agent.ico breaks build
stories.description: AmbientSFXMachineGUI.csproj references ApplicationIcon=agent.ico but the file is absent from the repo, causing CS7064 during build. Either add the icon or remove the csproj reference.
references: Â§2 Technology Decision (NuGet dependencies, build setup)

stories.title: Agent status cards
stories.description: One card per agent showing: name, mode, enabled state, file count, last played file, next-play countdown timer, and turbo mode badge. Bound to AgentViewModel via INotifyPropertyChanged.
references: Â§5.2 Agent Management — AgentCard UI elements
Â§3 Architecture (AgentViewModel exposes)

stories.title: Per-agent enable/disable toggle
stories.description: Toggle switch on each agent card to enable or disable the agent at runtime without restarting the application.
references: Â§5.2 Agent Management — AgentCard: Toggle switch → IsEnabled

stories.title: Per-agent volume slider
stories.description: Live volume slider on each agent card that takes effect immediately without restarting.
references: Â§5.2 Agent Management — AgentCard: Volume slider → Volume
Â§3.1 Machine concept (volume chain)

stories.title: Master volume and mute
stories.description: Global volume slider and mute toggle in the main toolbar that scales all machines simultaneously. Machine and agent volumes multiply into the app master: final = appMaster * machine.MasterVolume * agent.Volume * sound.VolumeOverride.
references: Â§4 Panel Layout System (Toolbar: App Master Vol | Mute All)
Â§3.1 Machine concept (volume chain)

stories.title: Force-play button per agent
stories.description: Button on each agent card that immediately triggers the agent's next sound, bypassing the current wait timer.
references: Â§5.2 Agent Management — AgentCard: Force-play button

stories.title: In-app config editor
stories.description: Slide-over form editor for all agent .config values (intervals, mode, volume, balance, turbo settings) with validation. Saves back to disk and hot-applies to the running SoundAgent.
references: Â§5.2 Agent Management — Config Editor (slide-over sheet, not a modal)

stories.title: Min/max interval range sliders
stories.description: Replace raw minute/second config fields in the config editor with a dual-handle range slider for the interval window.
references: Â§5.2 Agent Management — Config Editor (Dual-handle RangeSlider for min/max intervals)

stories.title: Balance visualizer
stories.description: Small L/R panning arc indicator on each agent card that updates to reflect where the last sound was panned.
references: Â§5.2 Agent Management — AgentCard: L/R balance arc indicator → LastPanValue

stories.title: Turbo mode indicator
stories.description: Animated pulse badge on the agent card when turbo mode is active, showing remaining turbo play count.
references: Â§5.2 Agent Management — AgentCard: Turbo badge (animated pulse ring) → IsInTurboMode, RemainingTurboPlays

stories.title: Drag-and-drop agent folder import
stories.description: User can drag a folder onto a machine to register it as a new agent in that machine without manual config editing.
references: Â§5.2 Agent Management — AgentCard UI
Â§5.8 Machine Management (Import machine — folder referenced in place)

stories.title: Machine data model and coordinator
stories.description: Introduce MachineViewModel (Id, Name, IconPath, IsEnabled, MasterVolume, RootPath, Agents) and MachineCoordinator owning ObservableCollection<MachineViewModel>. Refactor AgentCoordinator so its Agents collection lives on a MachineViewModel; playback/log/active-playback state stays on the coordinator (now MachineCoordinator) since the log is app-global.
references: Â§3 Architecture (MachineCoordinator, AgentCoordinator, MachineViewModel)
Â§3.1 Machine concept
Â§6 State Management

stories.title: Machines rail and machine card UI
stories.description: Left-edge dockable rail showing a vertical list of machine cards. Each card shows icon, name, enable toggle, master volume slider, and expands to reveal its agents. Selecting a machine scopes the agent panel to it.
references: Â§4 Panel Layout System (Default layout — Machines rail left edge)
Â§5.8 Machine Management (Machines rail)

stories.title: Per-machine master volume and group enable
stories.description: Implement the multiplier volume chain: final = appMaster * machine.MasterVolume * agent.Volume * sound.VolumeOverride. Disabling a machine pauses all of its agents as a group without restarting them.
references: Â§3.1 Machine concept (volume chain, disable behavior)
Â§5.8 Machine Management (machine card: enable toggle, master volume slider)

stories.title: Import existing console-app machine folder
stories.description: File > Import Machine picker that accepts a directory containing appSettings.config and snd/. Reads appName and icon from appSettings.config, then scans snd/<agent>/*.config to materialize AgentViewModels. References the folder in place (no copying). Validate against C:\Users\homel\OneDrive\Projects\SpookyAudioMachine, ThursdayGameNightAudioSFX, and ThursdayPacmanAudioSFX.
references: Â§5.8 Machine Management — Import machine (MachineImporter.cs)

stories.title: Create new empty machine
stories.description: Dialog to create a new machine: prompts for name, icon file, and root folder (new or existing empty directory). Creates the machine metadata and an empty snd/ subfolder.
references: Â§5.8 Machine Management — Create machine

stories.title: Rename, change icon, and reorder machines
stories.description: Context menu and drag-reorder on machine cards. Rename updates the persisted index; icon picker accepts .ico/.png and stores path relative to machine root when possible.
references: Â§5.8 Machine Management — Rename / change icon / reorder

stories.title: Remove machine (unlink, do not delete files)
stories.description: Remove action on a machine card that deletes the machine's entry from the index and unhooks its agents/library usages. Warns explicitly that audio files and .config files on disk are not touched.
references: Â§5.8 Machine Management — Remove machine

stories.title: Persist machine index to %AppData%
stories.description: Serialize MachineCoordinator state to %AppData%\AmbientAgents\machines\<id>.json (id, name, iconPath, isEnabled, masterVolume, rootPath, order). Restore on startup. Agent/sound configs remain at RootPath and are not duplicated here.
references: Â§8 Persistence (Machine index → %AppData%\AmbientAgents\machines\<id>.json)

stories.title: System tray submenu per machine
stories.description: Extend TrayService so each machine appears as a submenu in the tray context menu with its own icon and entries: toggle mute, solo (mute all others), show cards.
references: Â§5.8 Machine Management — Per-machine tray submenu

stories.title: Scope profiles, soundboard, and hotkeys per-machine
stories.description: Move profile/soundboard/hotkey storage under %AppData%\AmbientAgents\machines\<machineId>\ so each machine owns its own. Profiles apply only to their parent machine; soundboard buttons and hotkey bindings are machine-scoped. Global app-level hotkeys (mute all, show window) remain in the app-level hotkeys.json.
references: Â§8 Persistence (Profiles, Soundboard, Hotkeys — per-machine paths)

stories.title: AudioFileEntry and AudioLibrary registry
stories.description: Introduce AudioFileEntry (AbsolutePath, Sha256, Duration, ByteSize, FileName, Usages) and AudioLibrary as a process-wide singleton keyed by content hash with a secondary index by absolute path. Usages list is maintained by subscribing to mutations on every MachineViewModel.Agents[*].Files collection.
references: Â§3.2 Audio Library (AudioFileEntry, keying, usages, decentralized ownership)
Â§6 State Management (AudioLibrary singleton)

stories.title: Background SHA-256 hasher with cache
stories.description: Stream each referenced audio file through SHA-256 on a background thread; cache results in %AppData%\AmbientAgents\library.json keyed by path with file size+mtime invalidation. Surface a progress indicator for initial scans.
references: Â§3.2 Audio Library (Hashing: lazy, streamed SHA-256)
Â§8 Persistence (Library cache → library.json)
Â§5.9 Audio Library (progress indicator in tab header)

stories.title: Audio duration and size metadata probe
stories.description: Probe audio duration via NAudio (AudioFileReader.TotalTime) and file size; cache in library.json alongside the hash. Required for duration-based likely-duplicate matching.
references: Â§3.2 Audio Library (entry: Duration, ByteSize probed via NAudio)
Â§5.9 Audio Library — Duplicates tab (likely duplicates: duration within ±1%)

stories.title: Library panel: All Files tab
stories.description: New dockable LibraryPanel with a virtualized ListView showing filename, duration, size, usage count, and full path. Sortable by any column. Text filter in the tab header.
references: Â§5.9 Audio Library — All Files tab
Â§4 Panel Layout System (tabbed bottom dock)

stories.title: Library panel: Duplicates tab
stories.description: Two grouped sections: (1) Exact duplicates grouped by identical SHA-256. (2) Likely duplicates grouped by case/extension-insensitive filename match AND duration within ±1%. Each group shows all candidate paths with usage counts.
references: Â§3.2 Audio Library (Duplicate detection: tiered — exact and likely)
Â§5.9 Audio Library — Duplicates tab

stories.title: Library panel: Unused tab
stories.description: Lists library entries whose Usages collection is empty. Provides multi-select and a bulk remove-from-library action (does not delete files from disk).
references: Â§3.2 Audio Library (Unused detection: entries with empty Usages)
Â§5.9 Audio Library — Unused tab

stories.title: Show usages for a library file
stories.description: Clicking a file in any library tab opens a side drawer listing every (machine, agent) pair that references it. Each row has a 'navigate to' action that focuses the corresponding agent card in the main panel.
references: Â§5.9 Audio Library — Row actions: Show usages (side drawer)

stories.title: OS drag-drop audio ingest
stories.description: Drop audio files from Explorer onto the Library panel to register them (library entry only) or onto an agent card to register and attach to that agent in one step.
references: Â§5.9 Audio Library — Ingest (drag from Explorer)

stories.title: Add library file to additional agents/machines
stories.description: Action on a library row that opens a multi-select picker of machines and agents and appends the file to each chosen agent's file list. The same library entry can belong to many agents/machines.
references: Â§3.2 Audio Library (Reuse: single entry in many agents/machines)
Â§5.9 Audio Library — Row actions: Add to additional agents/machines

stories.title: Merge duplicates action
stories.description: In a duplicates group, select a canonical library entry and rewrite every agent reference that points at any other member of the group to point at the canonical one. Non-canonical entries become unused and appear in the Unused tab for optional cleanup.
references: Â§5.9 Audio Library — Row actions: Merge duplicates (Duplicates tab only)

stories.title: Reveal-in-Explorer and copy-path actions
stories.description: Row context menu on any library entry: open containing folder in Explorer, copy full path to clipboard.
references: Â§5.9 Audio Library — Row actions: Reveal in Explorer, Copy full path

stories.title: Scrolling live playback log
stories.description: Virtualised auto-scrolling ListView showing timestamp, agent name, and filename for every sound that fires. Capped at 500 entries with oldest pruned.
references: Â§5.4 Live Playback Log (LogEntryViewModel: Timestamp, AgentName, FileName, FilePath)
Â§6 State Management (ObservableCollection<LogEntryViewModel> capped at 500)

stories.title: Session history export
stories.description: Toolbar button serialises the full current-session log to a timestamped CSV file (timestamp, agent, filename).
references: Â§5.4 Live Playback Log — Export (Toolbar button → .csv)

stories.title: Per-sound enable/disable toggle
stories.description: Expand an agent card to reveal its file list. Each file has an enable/disable toggle preventing it from being selected during playback.
references: Â§5.3 Sound File Management (expanded file list: Enable/disable checkbox)
Â§5.2 Agent Management — AgentCard: Expand/collapse chevron reveals file list

stories.title: Per-sound volume override
stories.description: Set a volume multiplier on an individual sound file that stacks with the agent-level volume. Editable from the expanded file list on the agent card.
references: Â§5.3 Sound File Management (Volume override slider, defaults hidden, appears on hover)
Â§3.1 Machine concept (volume chain: sound.VolumeOverride up to 200%)

stories.title: Per-sound cooldown override
stories.description: Set a minimum re-fire interval on a specific file to prevent back-to-back repeats of annoying sounds.
references: Â§5.3 Sound File Management (Cooldown override field)

stories.title: Sound file search and filter
stories.description: Fuzzy search bar in the toolbar that filters across all agents and all sound files by filename.
references: Â§5.3 Sound File Management — global search bar in toolbar

stories.title: Session usage heatmap per sound
stories.description: Visual indicator (dot intensity or play count badge) on each file row showing how many times it has fired this session.
references: Â§5.3 Sound File Management (Session play count heatmap dot — color intensity scales with count)

stories.title: Right-click context menu on log entries
stories.description: Right-click any log row to: add to soundboard, disable that file, set a volume override, or open the containing folder in Explorer.
references: Â§5.4 Live Playback Log — Right-click context menu (disable file and set volume override require SFX-01/SFX-02 model)

stories.title: Now-playing panel with active sounds
stories.description: Collapsible dockable panel listing every sound currently playing, with agent name, filename, and a live progress bar driven by polling AudioFileReader.Position on a 100ms timer.
references: Â§5.5 Now Playing Panel
Â§4 Panel Layout System (tabbed bottom dock)
Â§6 State Management (ConcurrentDictionary<Guid, ActivePlayback>)

stories.title: Per-active-sound volume knob in now-playing
stories.description: Inline rotary volume control next to each active sound in the now-playing panel for quick in-the-moment adjustment.
references: Â§5.5 Now Playing Panel (Inline volume knob — rotary Slider style)

stories.title: Push-to-solo on active sound
stories.description: Button in the now-playing panel to temporarily mute all other agents while one sound finishes, then auto-unmute on playback end.
references: Â§5.5 Now Playing Panel (Solo button — mutes all other agents; auto-unmutes on playback end)

stories.title: Favorites soundboard panel
stories.description: Dockable grid of buttons for favorited sounds, scoped to the active machine. Clicking a button plays the sound immediately in parallel with normal agent activity, independent of agent scheduling.
references: Â§5.6 Soundboard / Favorites
Â§4 Panel Layout System (Soundboard / Favorites collapsible dockable)

stories.title: Add to favorites from playback log
stories.description: One-click star button on a log entry adds the sound to the soundboard without file browsing.
references: Â§5.4 Live Playback Log — Right-click context menu: Add to Soundboard
Â§5.6 Soundboard / Favorites

stories.title: Soundboard grid layout editor
stories.description: Edit-mode toggle that enables drag-to-reorder buttons, double-click rename, right-click delete, and group section dividers.
references: Â§5.6 Soundboard / Favorites — Layout editor mode

stories.title: Hotkey binding for soundboard buttons
stories.description: Assign a keyboard shortcut to any soundboard button via right-click so favorites can be triggered without focusing the window.
references: Â§5.6 Soundboard / Favorites — Hotkey assignment
Â§7 Hotkey Architecture (HotkeyService)

stories.title: Add to soundboard from agent file list
stories.description: Star button on each file row in an expanded agent card adds the file to the active machine's soundboard in one click. This is a second entry point to soundboard creation distinct from the log-row star (SB-02) and from log drag-drop (LOG-03).
references: Â§5.3 Sound File Management (Star button → adds to soundboard)
Â§5.6 Soundboard / Favorites (entry points to creating a SoundboardItem)

stories.title: Drag log entry to soundboard
stories.description: Log rows are drag sources; the soundboard panel is a drop target. Dropping a log entry creates a new soundboard button for that file.
references: Â§5.4 Live Playback Log — Drag from log to soundboard (log rows are drag sources; soundboard is drop target)

stories.title: Profile save and load
stories.description: Save the full current state of a machine (agent enable states, per-sound enable states, all volumes, machine master volume, soundboard layout, hotkeys, pinned agents) as a named JSON profile. Profiles are scoped per-machine and saved under %AppData%\AmbientAgents\machines\<machineId>\profiles\. Load restores all settings for that machine.
references: Â§5.7 Profiles (Profile JSON schema: agents, soundOverrides, soundboard, hotkeys, pinnedAgents)
Â§8 Persistence (Profiles per-machine → %AppData%\AmbientAgents\machines\<id>\profiles\*.json)

stories.title: Profile hot-swap
stories.description: Switch between profiles at runtime from a toolbar dropdown or hotkey. All settings apply immediately without restart. Skips any agent marked as pinned.
references: Â§5.7 Profiles — Profile picker (dropdown in main toolbar)
Â§6 State Management (ProfileService.Apply iterates agents, raises ProfileChanged)

stories.title: Quick-save current state as profile
stories.description: One-click snapshot of the current state saved as a new named profile. Prompts for a name then saves immediately.
references: Â§5.7 Profiles — Quick-save (floppy/snapshot icon next to picker)

stories.title: Profile diff viewer before swap
stories.description: Before applying a profile, show a collapsible summary of what will change (agents toggled, volumes shifted, sounds enabled/disabled) with confirm and cancel actions.
references: Â§5.7 Profiles — Profile picker (Diff view: collapsible summary, Confirm / Cancel)

stories.title: Profile audition / preview
stories.description: Hold-to-preview button that temporarily applies a profile's audio settings for a configurable duration (default 30s), then auto-reverts to the previous state.
references: Â§5.7 Profiles — Profile audition (hold-to-preview, configurable timeout default 30s, auto-reverts)

stories.title: Pin agent to exclude from profile swaps
stories.description: Pin toggle on an agent card to lock its enabled state and volume so profile hot-swaps do not affect it. Stored in the pinnedAgents list within the active profile JSON.
references: Â§5.7 Profiles (pinnedAgents field in profile JSON)
Â§5.2 Agent Management — AgentCard UI elements
